mapper.select: SELECT i.inquiry_no AS inquiryNo, i.member_id AS memberId, m.user_name AS guestName, i.title, i.content, i.answer, i.is_answered AS isAnswered, TO_CHAR(i.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(i.answered_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS answeredAt FROM INQUIRY_SPACE i JOIN MEMBER m ON i.member_id = m.member_id WHERE i.space_no = #{spaceNo} ORDER BY i.inquiry_no DESC

SELECT i.inquiry_no AS inquiryNo, i.space_no AS spaceNo, i.title, i.content, i.is_answered AS isAnswered, TO_CHAR(i.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, s.space_name AS spaceName, gd.NICKNAME AS guestName FROM INQUIRY_SPACE i JOIN SPACE s ON i.space_no = s.space_no JOIN GUEST_DETAIL gd ON i.member_id = gd.member_id WHERE s.host_id = #{hostId} ORDER BY i.inquiry_no DESC

SELECT i.inquiry_no AS inquiryNo, i.space_no AS spaceNo, i.member_id AS memberId, i.title, i.content, i.answer, i.is_answered AS isAnswered, TO_CHAR(i.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(i.answered_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS answeredAt, s.space_name AS spaceName, s.host_id AS hostId, gd.NICKNAME AS guestName FROM INQUIRY_SPACE i JOIN SPACE s ON i.space_no = s.space_no JOIN GUEST_DETAIL gd ON i.member_id = gd.member_id WHERE i.inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo}
